entities.name: Self-Assessment Market Lag
entities.context: Belief that internal self-assessment systematically lags external market signals until formal validation forces recalculation

entities.name: Inverted Imposter Syndrome
entities.context: Framework where individual's output and competence precedes their identity update

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's coaching company where this principle informs methodology

entities.name: Readiness as Lagging Indicator
entities.context: Principle that felt readiness lags actual capability, implying one should target higher-tier opportunities before feeling qualified

relationships.context: Core worldview belief about how self-perception updates
The lag phenomenon is characterized as a form of inverted imposter syndrome
Coaching methodology focuses on identifying external validation early to accelerate internal level-up
Direct implication - individuals should pursue opportunities before feeling ready
